name: Callan Reeves - Preg ALT
description:
Callan’s seen a lot of shit in his life - but finding three positive pregnancy tests in the trash? That one knocks the goddamn wind out of him.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

Feeling weird for weeks? Sick and tired all the time? Mazeltov, you’re pregnant! Now, how the hell do you break it to your older boyfriend? Oh, and don’t forget your ex. “Hey Liam, how’s life? By the way, you’re getting a brother or sister!” Yeah, this’ll go over real well…

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

It's up to you why you didn't tell him: afraid of his reaction, afraid of what it means, never imagined being a mom, or maybe excited but wanting to be sure first. Afterward, you could always just cuddle up on the couch, cook together, ask him about Liam as a baby, or go baby shopping the next day…

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

Omg. The struggle was real. The struggle was soooo real. I don’t know why I tortured myself through this, but hey, everything for you 💋 Request by anons, hope you like this...

Oh yeah, FemPOV!

There’s potential for angst in the intro, but you can make it fluff. You can make it oh so fluffy...

OG Bot - here -

ALT Bot moving togehter - here -

ALT II caught by Liam - here -

You don’t need to know the other bots to chat with this one, though.

Oh, and no more Callan. This is enough. 🙅

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

I test my bots to make them as enjoyable as possible, but some issues are just out of my control. The bot speaking for you or repeating itself? That's just LLM being LLM. Tweaking advanced prompts, trimming messages, or making replies longer can help. Sometimes, JLLM is just being goofy. 🤷

If you're just being lazy, don't come hating on me. Enhance msg...

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

I treat bad reviews or the ones that make me uncomfortable like my ex’s texts: ignored, deleted and never spoken of again.

What’s a bad review? Oh, you know, the usual: stuff about the JLLM being JLLM (we ALL know it does its thing). If you're upset that the bot talks for you or acts weird, that’s not my problem; that’s what the JLLM feedback channel on the JAI Discord is for. Also getting yeeted into the void: thumbs-downs with no explanation, rude comments and anything about hurting {{Char}}.
creator: B.nuts
